acceptanceCovered: every carousel slide measures exactly 525px tall on every page at lg+ viewports
long body text is truncated with an ellipsis instead of growing the card
e2e regression test 'carousel slides keep the fixed 525px design height' fails without the fix and passes with it
below lg the card keeps clamped intrinsic height with no horizontal overflow at 375px
All Kudos feed and profile card lists are unaffected (fixed mode is opt-in via prop)
unit tests, tsc --noEmit, eslint (changed files), and next build all pass
each edge peek carries a directional gradient overlay (dark at the outer edge, transparent toward the active card) instead of uniform opacity
e2e regression test 'edge peeks fade into the background via gradient overlays' fails without the fix and passes with it
regressionChecked: Highlight carousel layout (active card + peeks + arrows) — self-stretch + explicit lg:h-[525px] wrapper height still forces article height, unchanged by FIX 3; verified via playwright measurements [525,525] page1, [525,525,525]x3 pages, [525,525] page5, and the fixed-525px + gradient-overlay tests both pass together in the same run

KudoCard rendering in All Kudos feed and profile moderation list — grep-confirmed both callers (all-kudos-section.tsx:53, profile-kudos-section.tsx:81) omit `fixed`; unaffected by FIX 3, which only touches highlight-carousel.tsx PeekSlot/PEEK_CLASS

Mobile (sub-lg) single-card carousel rendering — PEEK_CLASS remains lg-gated (`lg:flex`), so the gradient overlay never renders below lg (peeks stay hidden entirely); no change to sub-lg behavior from FIX 3

unconditional min-h-0/overflow-hidden added to the content column and gold box by the prior fix — reviewed for regression risk: harmless in non-fixed mode since these boxes have no upstream height constraint there

edge peek overlays are decorative and non-interactive — outer PEEK_CLASS container keeps `aria-hidden`+`inert` unchanged so the overlay sits inside an already-decorative subtree; overlay itself carries `pointer-events-none`; empty-peek branch (no kudo) correctly renders no overlay since there's nothing to fade; gradient direction traced through code (align="end"→bg-gradient-to-r for the left/prev peek, align="start"→bg-gradient-to-l for the right/next peek) matches the pixel-profile evidence and the #00101a fade target matches the page's actual bg-[#00101a] (app/sun-kudos/page.tsx:41), so it genuinely blends into the page background, not just a coincidental color match
